title: Spicy Indian-Style Basmati Biryani
description: A flavorful and aromatic basmati rice biryani dish infused with the warmth of Indian spices. This recipe is perfect for a weekend lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add chopped onion and sauté until it turns translucent.
Add grated ginger and sauté for another minute.
Add coriander powder, turmeric powder, and red chili powder. Mix well.
Add basmati rice and mix well with the spice mixture.
Add water and salt. Mix well.
Bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and cook for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and fluffy.
Garnish with chopped coriander leaves, if desired.
